expected_visible_relationship: The chassis-only asset should read as one hard-surface Sherman-like armored hull fitted to the frozen golden treads.
actual_visible_relationship: User reported the asset is not a tank; it reads as a tent.
root_cause: The exporter lofted closed cross-sections with one top centerline point, producing a peaked canopy. Watertight, bounds, and raycast checks were false-green because a convex tent passes them.
next_gate: scripts/validate_authored_chassis_silhouette.mjs must fail v1.1 and require broad deck width, vertical side armor normals, sponson shoulder area, and anti-ridge silhouette before v1.2 can pass.
